name: Thomas Widmer
brief: I'm Thomas, recently retired from Zurich Insurance after 35 years. My wife Elisabeth still works part-time as a librarian. We own our home in Küsnacht — the mortgage is fully paid off. This is the first year I have mixed income: part salary, part pensions. I also did a partial capital withdrawal from my Pensionskasse. I have a Freizügigkeitskonto with CHF 180,000 — do I need to declare this? We have some medical bills from this year too.
